title: Fun Squad Aeroplane Launcher | Fun Outdoor Indoor Kids Toys | Assorted Designs
description: Directions 1. Remove the toy gun from its packaging. 2. Assemble the aeroplane launcher according to the included instructions. 3. Insert standard batteries (not included) into the battery compartment. 4. Load an aeroplane into the launcher. 5. Aim and pull the trigger to launch the aeroplane. 6. For indoor use, ensure the area is clear of obstructions and breakable items. 7. For outdoor use, find an open space to launch the aeroplanes.
